long_description:
There was a flapping seen in mzonec11 and we would need to run over auto stabilize SOP and FFDC collection
Following the SOP: https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/platform/alerts/troubleshooting_ceph_health_auto_stabilizes.md
short_description: Manual incident to run the auto-stabilization SOP on the mzonec11 DAL regional cluster
close_notes:
Ran the auto-stabilization SOP and collected the FFDC 
Updated all the details in RCA: https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/rca/issues/1145
